summary: Synchronized all CreateProfile controls with the fingerprint template: (1) CreateProfileModal.js — added _loadFingerprintTemplate() via DuckBridge, _cascadeOsChange() syncs WebGL vendor, screen presets, hardware tiers, language options, font options when OS select changes; GeneralTab exposes _osSelectCtrl; new WebGL summary row added; profile.create payload now includes screenWidth/Height/PixelRatio; (2) GeneralTab.js — exposed _osSelectCtrl and _osModelSelectCtrl for cascade hooks; (3) HardwareTab.js — added _webglVendorSelect, _rendererIn, _resSelect; default WebGL to Random; getValues() now parses resSelect value (W×H×PR), returns screenWidth/Height/PixelRatio, webglVendor/webglRenderer when mode=custom; (4) NetworkTab.js — expanded language list from 10 to 40 languages matching JSON; (5) SecurityTab.js — exposed _fontTagInput, getValues() now returns actual customFonts when mode=custom. Build 0 errors.
current_status: All 6 todos complete. CreateProfile modal fully synchronized: WebGL vendors cascade per OS (Qualcomm/ARM/Samsung for Android, Apple for iOS, NVIDIA/AMD/Intel for Windows), screen presets per OS, hardware tiers per OS, full 40-language list, platform-aware fonts. Build succeeded.
